zh.Trefaenor, Cardigan, Wales: 英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾
zh.of Castell Odwyn,Llanbadarn Odwyn,Cardig: 英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾利安巴達-德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd於1260年出生在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾時，她的父親Maredudd ap Cadwgon31歲，母親Gwenllian de Deuheubarth19歲。她於1285年與Ieuan ap Gruffudd在威爾士結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1332年在威爾士享年72歲。

zh-hans.of Castell Odwyn,Llanbadarn Odwyn,Cardig: 英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾利安巴達-德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd于1260年出生在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾时，她的父亲Maredudd ap Cadwgon31岁，母亲Gwenllian de Deuheubarth19岁。她于1285年与Ieuan ap Gruffudd在威尔士结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1332年在威尔士享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ellyw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ely
meanings: Biblical name, from a Hebrew word meaning ‘height’. This was borne by the priest and judge who brought up the future prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 4). It was especially popular among Puritans in the 17th century and has enjoyed a modest revival in recent years. As a Jewish name, it is also a short form of any of numerous names formed with el ‘God’, such as Eliezer , Elijah , and Elisha .

variants.name: Ella
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was originally a short form of any of various compound names containing ali ‘other, foreign’ ( compare Eleanor ). It is now often taken to be a variant or pet form of Ellen . It was famously borne by the American jazz singer Ella Fitzgerald ( 1917–1996 ), and has become increasingly popular in Britain since the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd was born in 1260, in Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Maredudd ap Cadwgon, was 31 and her mother, Gwenllian de Deuheubarth, was 19. She married Ieuan ap Gruffudd in 1285, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1332, in Wales, at the age of 72.

fr.of Castell Odwyn,Llanbadarn Odwyn,Cardig: Llanbadarn-odwyn, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd est née en 1260, à Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maredudd ap Cadwgon, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian de Deuheubarth, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Ieuan ap Gruffudd en 1285, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1332, à Galles, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd 1260 in Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maredudd ap Cadwgon 31 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian de Deuheubarth 19. Sie hat 1285 in Wales Ieuan ap Gruffudd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb 1332 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd è nata il nel 1260 nel Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Maredudd ap Cadwgon, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian de Deuheubarth, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Ieuan ap Gruffudd nel 1285, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1332, nel Galles, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellyw Angharad ferch Mareduddが1260年にイギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Maredudd ap Cadwgonは31歳，母Gwenllian de Deuheubarthは19歳であった。1285年にウェールズでIeuan ap Gruffuddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1332年にウェールズで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd(이)가 1260년 영국 웨일스 카디건실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maredudd ap Cadwgon(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian de Deuheubarth(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1285년 웨일스에서 Ieuan ap Gruffudd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1332년 웨일스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd nasceu em 1260, em Cardiganshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Maredudd ap Cadwgon, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian de Deuheubarth, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Ieuan ap Gruffudd em 1285, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1332, em Gales, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd родилась в 1260 г. в местности кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Maredudd ap Cadwgon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian de Deuheubarth, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ieuan ap Gruffudd в 1285 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1332 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellyw Angharad ferch Maredudd nació en 1260, en Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Maredudd ap Cadwgon, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Gwenllian de Deuheubarth, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ieuan ap Gruffudd en 1285, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1332, en Gales, a la edad de 72 años.
